caption: Attestation Finding
description: Attestation Finding events report the addition of a new attestation object to the attestation_list array in the events referenced by finding_info.related_events.
name: attestation_finding

attestation_authority_uid.description: The unique identifier of the attestation authority that generated this finding. In events referenced by finding_info.related_events, the current finding relates to those elements of the attestion_list array where attestion_authority_uid matches this value.
